# AXPONA — Ubiquitous Language

> **Classification:** [classification.yaml](classification.yaml) | **Architecture:** [STRATEGIC_DDD.md](STRATEGIC_DDD.md)

## Domain Entities

| Term | Definition | Context | DDD Pattern |
|------|-----------|---------|-------------|
| Exhibitor | Company or brand that purchases space to display products. Supply side of marketplace. Multi-edition lifecycle. | Exhibitor (CORE) | Aggregate Root |
| ExhibitorProfile | Public-facing exhibitor information (brand, products, description) | Exhibitor | Entity |
| RebookingRecord | Commitment to return for next edition within 30-day window post-show | Exhibitor | Entity |
| ProductListing | Exhibitor product catalog entry for attendee matching | Exhibitor | Entity |
| ServiceOrder | Exhibitor service request (drayage, AV, electrical) | Exhibitor | Entity |
| LeadRetrievalLicense | Purchased license for exhibitor to capture attendee leads | Exhibitor | Entity |
| PriorityPoints | Seniority-based booth selection order accumulated across editions | Exhibitor | Value Object |
| ExhibitorPackage | Bundle of space, services, and sponsorship add-ons with total price | Exhibitor | Value Object |
| Sponsorship | Audience attention sold to partners via physical/digital placements | Sponsorship (CORE) | Aggregate Root |
| SponsorshipDeliverable | Specific contracted placement or experience to be produced and verified | Sponsorship | Entity |
| SponsorshipItem | Individual inventory unit (lanyard, signage slot, lounge, etc.) | Sponsorship | Entity |
| SponsorshipPackage | Bundle of items with tier, price, and exclusivity flag | Sponsorship | Value Object |
| ExhibitionSpace | Physical area within venue assigned to an exhibitor. 5 space types. | Exhibition Space (CORE) | Aggregate Root |
| SpaceAssignment | Confirmed exhibitor-to-space mapping for an edition | Exhibition Space | Entity |
| FloorPlan | Versioned layout of all spaces for an edition | Exhibition Space | Entity |
| Venue | Physical facility hosting the event (Renaissance Schaumburg) | Exhibition Space | Entity |
| SpaceDimensions | Width, depth, sqft, corner flag, electrical access | Exhibition Space | Value Object |
| SpaceType | listening_room, expo, ear_gear, car_audio, alti | Exhibition Space | Value Object |
| Event | The show as an ongoing enterprise across editions | Event (CORE) | Aggregate Root |
| EventEdition | Single annual instance — the conformed dimension across all contexts | Event | Entity |
| Session | Educational seminar, Master Class, or panel | Event | Entity |
| Speaker | Presenter at a session | Event | Entity |
| EditionDateRange | Start date, end date, setup days for an edition | Event | Value Object |
| Attendee | Individual who registers and attends. Demand side of marketplace. | Attendee (SUPPORTING) | Aggregate Root |
| Registration | Attendee's sign-up record for an edition | Attendee | Entity |
| Badge | Physical credential for on-site access and lead capture | Attendee | Value Object |
| Ticket | Access level and price (6 types) | Attendee | Value Object |
| Interaction | Lead capture or matchmaking event between exhibitor and attendee | Interaction (SUPPORTING) | Aggregate Root |
| LeadRecord | Badge scan data — exhibitor-attendee contact record | Interaction | Entity |
| Agreement | Legal contract between AXPONA and exhibitor/sponsor/venue | Agreement (GENERIC) | Aggregate Root |
| AgreementTerm | Specific clause or condition within a contract | Agreement | Entity |
| FinancialAccount | Billing entity for exhibitor, sponsor, or attendee | Finance (GENERIC) | Aggregate Root |
| FinancialTransaction | Individual financial event (charge, payment, refund) | Finance | Entity |
| Payment | Cash movement against an invoice | Finance | Entity |
| Invoice | Billing document for space, sponsorship, tickets, or services | Finance | Entity |
| MonetaryAmount | Amount + currency pair | Finance | Value Object |
| RevenueAllocation | Mapping of payment to edition + revenue category | Finance | Value Object |

## Business Model Terms

| Term | Definition |
|------|-----------|
| Two-Sided Marketplace | Primary business model (weight 0.60). Exhibitors (supply) pay to access attendees (demand). |
| UFI 5 S Revenue Model | Industry-standard framework: Space, Services, Sign-up, Sponsorship, Subscription |
| Rebooking Rate | % of exhibitors who rebook within 30 days of show close. THE leading indicator. Confirmed: 80%. |
| Services Attach Rate | Services revenue as % of space revenue per exhibitor. Industry's fastest-growing stream. |
| Floor Plan Fill % | Assigned spaces / total spaces at T-90. Leading indicator of show quality. |
| Sponsorship Sell-Through | Sold items / available items by category. Heavy SOLD = demand exceeds supply. |
| CPM Equivalent | Sponsorship yield per 1,000 attendees ($19 in 2025). Pricing power metric. |
| Revenue per Sqft | Total space revenue / net sqft ($110 in 2025). Core value measure. |
| Listening Room Premium | Avg listening room price / avg booth price. Measures format innovation value. |
| Edition Margin | (Edition revenue - edition cost) / edition revenue. EBITDA margin per show (36% in 2025). |
| Niche Monopoly | AXPONA's competitive position — no direct competitor at scale in consumer audio. |

## Space Types

| Type | Description | Typical Price |
|------|-----------|---------------|
| Listening Room | Private demo space for audio equipment. Domain-specific to audio shows. | ~$6,577 avg |
| Expo Booth | Standard exhibit hall booth. | $1,300–$3,500 |
| Ear Gear Expo | Headphone/portable audio demo area. | $1,500–$2,500 |
| Car Audio | Vehicle-based audio demonstration. | Varies |
| ALTI Pavilion | Premium lifestyle/luxury audio area (emerging). | Premium pricing |

## Ticket Types

| Type | Price Range | Notes |
|------|-----------|-------|
| General Admission | $32–$40 | Single-day access |
| Friday Pass | $32 | |
| Saturday Pass | $40 | Highest demand day |
| Sunday Pass | $15 | Gen-Z pricing strategy |
| VIP | $100–$150 | Priority entry, exclusive events |
| Trade Pass | Varies | Industry professional access (B2B) |

## Lifecycle Terms

| Term | Definition |
|------|-----------|
| Edition | Single annual instance of the show. The conformed dimension — join key across all contexts. |
| Value Stream | Plan → Sell → Market → Execute → Retain (5 stages, annual cycle) |
| Conformed Dimension | Dimension shared across all marts. For AXPONA: `dim_edition`. |

## Context Map Patterns

| Pattern | Definition | AXPONA Usage |
|---------|-----------|-------------|
| Customer-Supplier | One context consumes data from another | Exhibitor → Exhibition Space |
| Conformist | One context adopts another's model directly | Event → Attendee (via edition_id) |
| Shared Kernel | Both contexts share a common model | Exhibition Space ↔ Event (dim_edition) |
| ACL | Translation boundary between contexts | Attendee → Finance |
| Published Language | Canonical schema consumed by many | Agreement → Exhibitor, Sponsorship, Finance |

## Industry Terms

| Term | Definition |
|------|-----------|
| CEIR | Center for Exhibition Industry Research — publishes the Four-Metric Index |
| CEIR Four-Metric Index | Net Square Feet, Professional Attendance, Number of Exhibitors, Real Revenue |
| UFI | Union of International Fairs — global trade show industry association |
